title: MAPseq2: A Sensitive and Cost-Effective Barcoded Connectomics Method
abstract: MAPseq2 is an improved version of the MAPseq barcoded connectomics technique that achieves greater sensitivity and substantially reduced cost compared to the original method. Enables high-throughput single-neuron projection mapping with improved barcode detection efficiency, making barcoded connectomics accessible to a wider range of laboratories.
notes: New paper. Next-generation barcoded connectomics method improving on MAPseq.
